title: Inventory FULL Notifier + Autosell
description: A lightweight client-side Fabric mod that notifies you when your inventory is full and helps with auto-selling!
body:
![InventoryFullNotifier+Autosell](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dev-jcwd/Inventory-Full-Notifier-Autosell/main/BANNER.gif)  

![Fabric Only](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-blue?logo=fabricmc&logoColor=white)
![Client Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client--Side-green)
![MC Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21%20→%201.21.11-yellow)

[![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Community-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/TubuNkwPam)  

---

**InventoryNotifier+Autosell** is a lightweight **client-side** mod designed to make grinding and farming smoother.  

This mod can be used just as an **inventory full notifier**, or as a helper for **auto-selling**!  

---

# ✅ Features
- 📢 **Smart Notifications** → Alerts you only once when your inventory is full.  
- 🔔 **Ping Sounds** → Plays a sound when your inventory is full and when items are autosold.  
- 🔄 **Automatic Selling** → Triggers `/sell all`, `/sell handall`, or a **custom command** as soon as you’re full.  
- 📦 **Slots Counter** → Shows the number of free slots left after freeing space or autoselling.  
- 🌍 **Server-Friendly** → Works on servers that already support `/sell` or similar commands.  
- 💻 **Lightweight** → 100% client-side, no server install required.  
- ⚙️ **Config Menu** → Open with <kbd>`</kbd> (keybind customizable in Controls under **IFN+Autosell**).  
- 💰 **Autosell Threshold** → Set how many items trigger auto-sell.  
- 🎯 **Milestone Threshold Notifications** → Get notified at custom progress milestones.  
- 🔘 **Quick Autosell Mode Switch** → Toggle between autosell modes with a simple button.  

---

# ⚙️ Auto-Sell Commands
- **/autosell** → Toggles auto-sell (default: all).  
- **/autosell set all** → Runs `/sell all` (⚠️ sells everything).  
- **/autosell set handall** → Runs `/sell handall` (only the held item type).  
- **/autosell set custom <command>** → Runs your own command  
 *(example: `/autosell set custom pwarp base` → triggers `/pwarp base`)*.  
- **To deactivate auto-sell**, simply retype `/autosell`.  

---

# 🆕 Recent Updates
- 🆙 **Updated support to Minecraft 1.21.8 → 1.21.11**
- 🔧 **Improved compatibility** with latest 1.21.11 changes  
- ⚡ **Minor performance optimizations** - 🐞 **Fixed small edge-case issues** - 🧹 **General internal improvements** for better stability  
- 🆕 Added **in-game Config Menu** (Open with <kbd>`</kbd>)
- 🆕 Added **Quick Autosell Mode Switch Button** for faster toggling  

---
